message.value: No uncertain parameter has name. Note that the sensitivity analysis only recognizes named parameters.

title.value: Less than two named uncertain parameters

message.value: Less than two uncertain parameters have names. Note that the sensitivity analysis only recognizes named parameters

title.value: This is my title message for program: {program}

message.value: This is the message, explaining there is a bug in {program} when using the net {netName}

title.value: Error code: {errorCode}, this is my title message for program: {program}

message.value: This is the message, explaining there is a bug in {program} when using the net {netName}, \nError code:{errorCode}
Could not execute some IO operation
